channel.title: Quickstart on Jsonnet-as-a-Service
channel.description: Recent content in Quickstart on Jsonnet-as-a-Service

item.title: Get started
item.description:
Two ways to start: render Jsonnet locally with no cluster at all, or install the JaaS service on Kubernetes and call its HTTP endpoint.

  • Quickstart — install JaaS and render your first snippet over HTTP.
  • Install on Kubernetes — prerequisites and the Helm install in full.
  • Local rendering — evaluate Jsonnet on your own machine, no cluster required.
